item.title:
The Binance Online agenda is now live.
See the speakers, the sessions, and what’s coming next.
Exp...
item.description:
The Binance Online agenda is now live.
See the speakers, the sessions, and what’s coming next.
Explore the full lineup 👉 https://t.co/E2pOBRypyk https://t.co/5ZRaUY2SI9
--- @binance | ❤️ 19 | 🔁 1 | 💬 6 | 👁 827
item.author: @binance

item.title: MRC is already deployed across all of OpenAI’s largest supercomputers that we use to train frontier ...
item.description:
MRC is already deployed across all of OpenAI’s largest supercomputers that we use to train frontier models, including our site with @Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) in Abilene, Texas, and in @Microsoft’s Fairwater supercomputers.
MRC is now available through the @OpenComputePrj for the entire industry to use and build on.
--- @OpenAI | ❤️ 12 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 1642
item.author: @OpenAI

item.title: We’ve partnered with @AMD, @Broadcom, @Intel, @Microsoft, and @NVIDIA, to release Multipath Reliable...
item.description:
We’ve partnered with @AMD, @Broadcom, @Intel, @Microsoft, and @NVIDIA, to release Multipath Reliable Connection (MRC), a new open networking protocol that helps large AI training clusters run faster and more reliably, with less wasted GPU time.
https://t.co/AiV952AJXs
--- @OpenAI | ❤️ 106 | 🔁 7 | 💬 12 | 👁 1968
item.author: @OpenAI
@tunguz
